nasb.text: On the eighth day they held a solemn assembly, for the dedication of the altar they observed seven days and the feast seven days.

esv.text: And on the eighth day they held a solemn assembly, for they had kept the dedication of the altar seven days and the feast seven days.

cnv.text: 第八天舉行了嚴肅會，又舉行獻壇禮七天，舉行了七天的節期。

ccb.text: 第八天举行庄严的聚会，又举行七天献坛礼。之后，他们又欢庆七天。
